    Nasi Goreng: Indonesian Fried Rice

    Visit
    5
    (2)

    30 mins

    Yield: 1
    Nasi goreng, or fried rice, is one of Indonesia’s most famous dishes and is prominent in Indonesian ...
    Nasi goreng, or fried rice, is one of Indonesia’s most famous dishes and is prominent in Indonesian ...

    Ingredients

    1 cup old cooked white rice3 shallots, peeled, chopped2 cloves garlic, peeled, chopped2 big chillies (optional)¼ tsp dried shrimp paste (optional)
